html:
Exclusive to:

“It will change the Florid Postern into the Celestial Portal construction project.”

-

The Portal Paraphernalia is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Celestial Filter, and requires a Board and a Rope to craft. Portal Paraphernalia is required to start construction on upgrading the Florid Postern to the Celestial Portal.

Trivia

  • Paraphernalia is defined as a group of apparatus, equipment, or furnishing used for a particular activity.
  • The Portal Paraphernalia's crafting description is a possible reference to a Poem by Robert Burns.

Gallery

  • Wilson standing next to the Portal Paraphernalia.
  • The Portal Paraphernalia when placed on the Florid Postern.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Stuff for science!”
–Wilson
“I'd rather burn things down than build them up.”
–Willow
“If Wolfgang build it, they will come.”
–Wolfgang
“Shall I even bother building this?”
–Wendy
“UPGRADING SOFTWARE”
–WX-78
“Oh, I do like the look of this.”
–Wickerbottom
“Well, better get building.”
–Woodie
“I suppose I should build this.”
–Maxwell
“Pörtal! Prepare tö be built!”
–Wigfrid
“We should build this.”
–Webber
“It's a recipe for building!”
–Warly
“Door plans”
–Wormwood
“Let's get building.”
–Winona
“But it's more fun to wing it!”
–Wortox
“Look easy to build!”
–Wurt
“I'm good at following instructions! I have a badge for it!”
–Walter
“What's a little more tampering going to hurt?"”
–Wanda
“It will change the Florid Postern into the Celestial Portal construction project.”
-
The Portal Paraphernalia is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Celestial Filter, and requires a Board and a Rope to craft. Portal Paraphernalia is required to start construction on upgrading the Florid Postern to the Celestial Portal.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Paraphernalia is defined as a group of apparatus, equipment, or furnishing used for a particular activity.
The Portal Paraphernalia's crafting description is a possible reference to a Poem by Robert Burns.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Wilson standing next to the Portal Paraphernalia.
The Portal Paraphernalia when placed on the Florid Postern.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cổng thông tin là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Thiên Thể và cần có Ván Ép và Dây Thừng để chế tạo. Cần có Vật dụng Cổng thông tin để bắt đầu xây dựng nâng cấp Florid Postern lên Cổng Thiên thể.
title: Portal Paraphernalia

{{Scrapbook Info|It will change the Florid Postern into the Celestial Portal construction project.}}
The '''Portal Paraphernalia''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is found in the [[Celestial Filter]], and requires a [[Boards|Board]] and a [[Rope]] to craft. Portal Paraphernalia is required to start construction on upgrading the [[Florid Postern]] to the [[Celestial Portal]].

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* [[Wikipedia:Paraphernalia|Paraphernalia]] is defined as a group of apparatus, equipment, or furnishing used for a particular activity.
* The Portal Paraphernalia's crafting description is a possible reference to a [[Wikipedia:To a Mouse|Poem]] by [[Wikipedia:Robert Burns|Robert Burns]].

</gallery>
